subcodes.first_line: O Abul-Fadl! My hope from the favors of the Desired One is that thou mayest be preserved and protected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضائل امید از الطاف حضرت مقصود چنانست که محفوظ و مصونی
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
